content.text:
Here is a set of valid sample data that matches all the schema requirements for the manySchemasTool tool:

- string: "Hello, world!"
- stringMin: "Hello!"
- stringMax: "ShortTxt"
- stringEmail: "sample@example.com"
- stringEmoji: "😊"
- stringUrl: "https://example.com"
- stringUuid: "123e4567-e89b-12d3-a456-426614174000"
- stringCuid: "cklbz5z8f0002h1t4z5h0r9yb"
- stringRegex: "test-example"
- number: 42
- numberGt: 5
- numberLt: 3
- numberGte: 7
- numberLte: 1
- numberMultipleOf: 8
- numberInt: 15
- exampleArray: ["foo", "bar", "baz"]
- arrayMin: ["element"]
- arrayMax: ["one", "two"]
- date: "2024-06-10T12:00:00Z"
- dateAfter: "2024-06-15T00:00:00Z"
- dateBefore: "2024-05-01T00:00:00Z"
- actualData: "2024-06-16T08:00:00Z"
- object: { foo: "bar", bar: 55 }
- objectNested: { user: { name: "Jo", age: 20 } }
- objectPassthrough: {}
- objectLoose: {}
- optional: null
- nullable: null
- enum: "B"
- nativeEnum: "C"
- unionPrimitives: "text or number"
- unionObjects: { amount: 10, inventoryItemName: "Pen" }
- default: "test"

If you need any explanation for a specific field or want to test a different set of constraints, let me know!

content.text:
Here is the validated tool output using sample data with many different schema types:

{
  "string": "Sample text",
  "stringMin": "Hello!",
  "stringMax": "ShortText",
  "stringEmail": "example@email.com",
  "stringEmoji": "😊",
  "stringUrl": "https://www.example.com",
  "stringUuid": "123e4567-e89b-12d3-a456-426614174000",
  "stringCuid": "cjy1v3jjx0000qrsx9n7j5x2y",
  "stringRegex": "test-sample",
  "number": 5.5,
  "numberGt": 10,
  "numberLt": 3,
  "numberGte": 1,
  "numberLte": 1,
  "numberMultipleOf": 8,
  "numberInt": 42,
  "exampleArray": [
    "apple",
    "banana"
  ],
  "arrayMin": [
    "item1"
  ],
  "arrayMax": [
    "a",
    "b",
    "c"
  ],
  "date": "2023-12-12T10:00:00.000Z",
  "dateAfter": "2024-03-10T00:00:00.000Z",
  "dateBefore": "2024-03-10T00:00:00.000Z",
  "actualData": "2022-11-11T10:00:00.000Z",
  "object": {
    "foo": "bar",
    "bar": 7
  },
  "objectNested": {
    "user": {
      "name": "Jo",
      "age": 30
    }
  },
  "objectPassthrough": {},
  "objectLoose": {},
  "nullable": null,
  "enum": "A",
  "nativeEnum": "B",
  "unionPrimitives": "test-value",
  "unionObjects": {
    "amount": 7,
    "inventoryItemName": "Widget"
  },
  "default": "test"
}

If you want explanations about any field, let me know!
